items.title: Verisave, Optimized Payments and Fee Navigator Launch AI-Powered Verification Tool for Visa CEDP
items.description: Three payment industry leaders have joined forces to create an AI-powered compliance verification tool for Visa's Commercial Enhanced Data Program (CEDP). Developed by Fee Navigator, Optimized Payments and Verisave, the free tool gives B2B merchants an instant assessment of their compliance status under CEDP's rules and identifies potential savings opportunities.
